response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive full-stack experience with a strong alignment to the required stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Vitest) and deep expertise in scalable systems, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud-native development. His background in optimizing high-throughput systems, contributing to architecture decisions, and mentoring others aligns well with the role's core responsibilities.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React
Proven track record in building scalable, high-performance systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests)
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and modern tooling (MCP, Kubernetes)
concerns: Limited recent experience with PostgreSQL or relational databases (primary experience with MongoDB)
No explicit mention of Nest.js, which is a core requirement
Minimal exposure to Kotlin/Java, though this is listed as secondary

key_factors.factor: Relevant full-stack experience with core stack
